item.name: Pewter Necklace Coffer (IL 525)
item.description:
A pewter-lined chest containing an accessory. If you guessed said accessory would be a necklace, you may─or may not─be correct.

Required level: 82. IL: 525. Necklace type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
